case_title: CALFOX INC. et al vs. BENNER, REB SULLIVAN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET #2807, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,241.47 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,761.47, LEASE FORFEITED
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-28-2000 - BY THE COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN

DEPT. 304 JUDGE: STUART R. POLLAK,REPORTER: LESLIE SCHNEIDER, CLERK: GARTH SAYERS. ASSIGNED FROM 206. PLAINTIFF APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT FOUND THAT NOTICE HAD BEEN GIVEN AS REQUIRED BY LAW. DOCUMENTARY EXHIBITS WERE MARKED, EXAMINED BY THE COURT, AND RETURNED. DEFAULT TAKEN. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. BACK RENT = $2,241.47 ATTORNEY FEES= $520.00. JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALFOX INC. FELL PROPERTIES INC POLK MARKET CO. AS TO DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALFOX INC. FELL PROPERTIES INC POLK MARKET CO.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNER, REB SULLIVAN

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALFOX INC. FELL PROPERTIES INC POLK MARKET CO. COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-28-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 304 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
